title: Venezuelan Taco Shells
description: A recipe for crispy taco shells inspired by Venezuelan cuisine. Perfect for topping with your favorite fillings.

ingredients.name: Venezuelan Cheese
ingredients.notes: Can be substituted with vegan mozzarella or parmesan

instructions: Place taco shells on a baking sheet and bake for 5-7 minutes or until crispy.
In a pan, melt Venezuelan cheese over low heat.
Add caramelized onions and stir until combined.
Spoon cheese mixture onto a baked taco shell.
Top with charred tomatoes, chopped cilantro, and a sprinkle of flaky sea salt.
